news.title:
Wipro remains flat at ₹201.19 after announcing a multi-year deal with US-based TruStage for tech modernization.
Muted stock reaction reflects cautious IT sector sentiment; Nifty IT index flat, Infosys and Coforge lagging.
news.summary:
Wipro remains flat at ₹201.19 after announcing a multi-year deal with US-based TruStage for tech modernization.
Muted stock reaction reflects cautious IT sector sentiment; Nifty IT index flat, Infosys and Coforge lagging.

news.title:
Kotak cuts IT stock price targets by 15-28%, maintaining long-term relevance and terminal growth assumptions.
Preferred stocks include Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Coforge, and Hexaware; highest upside potential at 39% for Coforge.
news.summary:
Kotak cuts IT stock price targets by 15-28%, maintaining long-term relevance and terminal growth assumptions.
Preferred stocks include Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Coforge, and Hexaware; highest upside potential at 39% for Coforge.

news.title:
Coforge advances AI-driven Data Cosmos platform for transforming fragmented data into high-performance ecosystems.
Data Cosmos supports enterprises in BFSI, healthcare, retail, and more with cloud-native, GenAI-enabled solutions.
news.summary:
Coforge advances AI-driven Data Cosmos platform for transforming fragmented data into high-performance ecosystems.
Data Cosmos supports enterprises in BFSI, healthcare, retail, and more with cloud-native, GenAI-enabled solutions.

news.title:
Mid-tier IT firms like Coforge, LTIMindtree, and Zensar secure AI-led large contracts, highlighting rising demand for digital transformation.
Deals include Zensar's $210M financial services contract and LTIMindtree's $100M European medical tech project, emphasizing AI-driven innovation.
news.summary:
Mid-tier IT firms like Coforge, LTIMindtree, and Zensar secure AI-led large contracts, highlighting rising demand for digital transformation.
Deals include Zensar's $210M financial services contract and LTIMindtree's $100M European medical tech project, emphasizing AI-driven innovation.

news.title:
Coforge partners with VHC Health for IT services, enhancing healthcare digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, and clinician experience.
Coforge secures a £158M UK contract; Q3FY26 revenue rose 5.1% to ₹4,188 crore, with EBIT margins at 13.4%.
news.summary:
Coforge partners with VHC Health for IT services, enhancing healthcare digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, and clinician experience.
Coforge secures a £158M UK contract; Q3FY26 revenue rose 5.1% to ₹4,188 crore, with EBIT margins at 13.4%.

news.title: Coforge secures $158M (₹1,400 Cr) contract with UK client for 5 years.
news.summary: Coforge secures $158M (₹1,400 Cr) contract with UK client for 5 years.

news.title:
Nifty IT index plunged 21% in February, eroding LIC and mutual fund IT holdings by 20%, losing ₹81,000 crore and ₹45,000 crore respectively.
Infosys, TCS, HCL, and mid-tier IT firms like Coforge and KPIT dropped sharply on AI fears, with HSBC forecasting 14-16% sector revenue deflation.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index plunged 21% in February, eroding LIC and mutual fund IT holdings by 20%, losing ₹81,000 crore and ₹45,000 crore respectively.
Infosys, TCS, HCL, and mid-tier IT firms like Coforge and KPIT dropped sharply on AI fears, with HSBC forecasting 14-16% sector revenue deflation.

news.title:
CLSA cuts Coforge TP from Rs 2426 to Rs 2278/share.
Rating remains Outperform with High Conviction.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts Coforge TP from Rs 2426 to Rs 2278/share.
Rating remains Outperform with High Conviction.

news.title:
CLSA cuts price targets for 8 IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, and Wipro, citing downside risks.
Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts price targets for 8 IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, and Wipro, citing downside risks.
Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.

news.title:
FIIs reduced stakes in Indian IT firms like Infosys and TCS amid AI concerns.
Investor sentiment shift reflects pressure on the IT sector over the past year.
news.summary:
FIIs reduced stakes in Indian IT firms like Infosys and TCS amid AI concerns.
Investor sentiment shift reflects pressure on the IT sector over the past year.

news.title:
Coforge Ltd. executed an NSE block trade of ~760,483 shares at Rs. 1416.4.
The transaction totaled Rs. 107.71 crores.
news.summary:

news.title:
Coforge Ltd's open interest surged 13.1% as its stock fell 6% on Feb 12, 2026.
This divergence may indicate a shift in market positioning and investor sentiment.
news.summary:

news.title:

The trade involved ~1,115,262 shares at Rs. 1552.4 per share.

news.title:
Coforge and Persistent posted double-digit revenue growth in Dec quarter.
They outperformed mid-tier IT peers amid a slowdown in the sector.
news.summary:
Coforge and Persistent posted double-digit revenue growth in Dec quarter.
They outperformed mid-tier IT peers amid a slowdown in the sector.

news.title:
TCS and Infosys face challenges from AI disruption, leading to restructuring and margin pressure.
Specialized IT firms like Coforge and Persistent Systems thrive in AI-driven sectors like travel and EVs.

news.title:
Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Persistent, and Coforge may see focus after US SaaS stocks' 25% intraday plunge.
US-listed ADRs of Infosys and Wipro fell 6% and 5%, with Nifty IT index up 1.4% Tuesday.
news.summary:
Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Persistent, and Coforge may see focus after US SaaS stocks' 25% intraday plunge.
US-listed ADRs of Infosys and Wipro fell 6% and 5%, with Nifty IT index up 1.4% Tuesday.

news.title:
Coforge Ltd opened 4.5% higher on 3 Feb 2026, showing strong market sentiment.
The stock outperformed key benchmarks, supported by consecutive gains.
news.summary:
Coforge Ltd opened 4.5% higher on 3 Feb 2026, showing strong market sentiment.
The stock outperformed key benchmarks, supported by consecutive gains.

news.title:
Coforge's acquisition of Encora aims to enhance its AI-led engineering and cloud services.
The combined entity's pro forma revenue is expected to reach $2.5 billion post-transaction.
news.summary:
Coforge's acquisition of Encora aims to enhance its AI-led engineering and cloud services.
The combined entity's pro forma revenue is expected to reach $2.5 billion post-transaction.

news.title:
Coforge removed Advent's rights to appoint board committee members after 31% shareholder dissent to secure approval for its $2.4B Encora buyout.
Despite governance changes, analysts question Encora's valuation, citing its 4x sales and 21x EBITDA multiples, and M&A integration challenges.
news.summary:
Coforge removed Advent's rights to appoint board committee members after 31% shareholder dissent to secure approval for its $2.4B Encora buyout.
Despite governance changes, analysts question Encora's valuation, citing its 4x sales and 21x EBITDA multiples, and M&A integration challenges.

news.title:
Coforge secures early U.S. antitrust approval for Encora acquisition.
The waiting period concluded earlier than anticipated, expediting the process.
news.summary:
Coforge secures early U.S. antitrust approval for Encora acquisition.
The waiting period concluded earlier than anticipated, expediting the process.
